allow: Bash(sed -i 's|<script src=""../../assets/js/swiffy-slider.min.js"" defer></script>|<script type=""module"">\\n        import\(""../../assets/js/swiffy-slider.js""\).then\(\({ swiffyslider }\) => {\\n            window.addEventListener\(""load"", \(\) => swiffyslider.init\(\)\);\\n        }\);\\n    </script>|g' "$f")
